name: Vegetable Quiche
recipeInstructions:
Your choice--can be frozen or fresh Can substitute Egg Beaters, etc.
Dump vegetables, cheese, and onion in a 10-inch pie pan sprayed with non-stick spray.
Blend remaining ingredients in blender and pour over vegetables and cheese. Bake at 375°F for 20-30 minutes.
Serve: WW Exchange per serving: 2 protein (1 egg & 1 cheese), 1/2 milk, 1 fat, 30 optional calories. I usually use Egg Beaters and omit the vegetable oil. This will also freeze well.
